mapper.sql:
FROM TWORK_MST_AR AR INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_CT CT ON CT.CTKEY = AR.CTKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_ZN ZN ON ZN.CTKEY = AR.CTKEY AND ZN.ZNKEY = AR.ZNKEY
AND #{SEARCH_CONDITION}
mapper.select: /* wms-ctmaster-area-sql-oracle.xml - selectAreaInfo */ SELECT AR.CTKEY , CT.CTNM , AR.ZNKEY , ZN.ZNNM , AR.ARKEY , AR.ARNM , AR.ICTMPRDIVCD , AR.BNDDIVCD , AR.ARDIVCD , AR.WRHOUSDIVCD , AR.ANSUNGB2BPOCTG , AR.NAMSAB2BPOCTG , AR.BUSANB2BPOCTG , AR.SEJONGB2BPOCTG , AR.INSERTDATE , AR.INSERTURKEY , AR.UPDATEDATE , AR.UPDATEURKEY FROM TWORK_MST_AR AR INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_CT CT ON CT.CTKEY = AR.CTKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_ZN ZN ON ZN.CTKEY = AR.CTKEY AND ZN.ZNKEY = AR.ZNKEY WHERE AR.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND AR.ZNKEY = #{znkey} AND AR.ARKEY = #{arkey}
